title: Fix runtime config update order (write file first, then update runtime config, then reload)

requirements: Reorder operations in POST /api/settings endpoint: write .env file first
Update runtime config only after successful file write
Call Config.reload() after successful write and runtime update
Verify runtime config matches .env file content after save
acceptance: 4 test cases pass: verify by pytest novel_agent/tests/test_settings_save_order.py -v
File write happens before runtime update: verify by rg order in app.py save_settings
Config.reload() called after write: verify by rg 'Config.reload\(\)' novel_agent/web/app.py
Runtime config matches .env after save: verify by test

shared_context.pattern: Write file → Verify success → Update runtime → Reload config
conventions: Don't update runtime if write fails

pre_analysis.action: Load context package for current order analysis

implementation_approach.title: Red Phase - Write failing tests for correct save order
implementation_approach.description: Write 4 test cases that verify file write happens before runtime update
modification_points: Create 1 test file: novel_agent/tests/test_settings_save_order.py with 4 test cases
logic_flow: Write 4 test cases mocking write/update/reload calls and verifying order
Run pytest to verify tests fail (wrong order)
implementation_approach.output: 4 failing test cases for save order

implementation_approach.title: Green Phase - Reorder save_settings operations to correct sequence
implementation_approach.description: Reorder operations in save_settings: write → verify → update → reload
modification_points: Move 1 code block: lines 328-331 (runtime update) to after line 325 (file write)
Add 1 function call: Config.reload() after runtime update
Wrap entire operation in try-except for atomicity
Add rollback logic if reload fails
logic_flow: Paste after line 325 (env_file.write_text) inside try block
Add Config.reload() call after runtime config update
Ensure file write error prevents runtime update and reload
Run pytest to verify all 4 tests pass

implementation_approach.title: Refactor Phase - Extract save operation into helper method
implementation_approach.description: Refactor save_settings to extract save-and-reload logic into helper
modification_points: Add 1 validation: verify .env file content matches runtime config after reload
Improve 1 rollback mechanism: restore previous config if reload fails
Add 1 logging statement: log successful save with values written
logic_flow: Extract save-and-reload logic into helper method
Implement rollback: if reload fails, restore previous .env and runtime config
Add validation: read .env file after save, compare with runtime config values
Add logging.info with saved values (sanitized for secrets)
Update save_settings to call helper and handle return value
Run pytest novel_agent/tests/ -v to ensure no regressions
